description:
Solar Operations and Maintenance (O&M) needs to schedule a 14-day planned maintenance outage for a 50 MW PV plant. Compare a summer outage (July 1-14, hour indices 4344-4679) and a winter outage (December 1-14, hour indices 8016-8351) to minimize lost PPA revenue. Using PySAM, model a 50 MW DC single-axis tracking PV plant (DC-to-AC ratio 1.2, system losses 14.08%, inverter efficiency 96%, tilt 0, azimuth 180) using a US TMY weather file from the directory path in /home/ga/.SAM/solar_resource_dir.txt. Calculate energy production and lost revenue (at a PPA price of $0.04/kWh) for a baseline year, the summer outage scenario, and the winter outage scenario. Model the outages using the PySAM AdjustmentFactors hourly array. Save the script to /home/ga/Documents/SAM_Projects/outage_analysis.py and the results to /home/ga/Documents/SAM_Projects/outage_results.json using the following schema:
{
  "baseline_energy_kwh": <float>,
  "summer_outage_energy_kwh": <float>,
  "winter_outage_energy_kwh": <float>,
  "summer_lost_revenue_dollars": <float>,
  "winter_lost_revenue_dollars": <float>,
  "recommended_outage_season": "<summer or winter>"
}
